description.from: Deals ??? P.DMG to all enemies and pushes them back.
description.to: Deals 830*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+300% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to all enemies and knocks them back. This skill is applied as a normal attack.

description.from: Deals ??? P.DMG 3 times to frontal enemies, and each attack has a 100% chance of knocking them down for 2 sec.
description.to:
Deals 415*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+200% of Attack Power as Physical Damage 3 time to enemies in front.
Each hit knocks them down for 1 sec and increases Physical Damage taken by 8% for 7 sec. This effect stacks up to 3 times.

description.from: Attacks a random target and the enemies near it 5 times, dealing a total of ??? P.DMG and reducing their ATK Spd by 400. If the target is not a Hero, deals ??? additional P.DMG.
description.to: Deals 253*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+122% of Attack Power as Physical Damage 5 times to a random enemy and nearby enemies, reducing their Attack Speed by 12% for 8 sec. Against non-hero enemies, deals an additional 308*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+148.2% of Attack Power as Physical Damage.

description.from: When dealing a normal attack, shoots additional bullet with a 60% chance of dealing ??? P.DMG to all enemies.
description.to: On Normal Attack, fires an additional projectile that deals 117*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+56.1% of Attack Power as extra Physical Damage to all enemies and increases your Attack by 0.5% for 10 sec. The Attack increase stacks up to 100 times and cannot be dispelled.

light.from: Increase P.DMG that the target takes by 25% for 10 sec.
light.to: If there is only 1 enemy, damage dealt is increased by 100%.

dark.from: Upon activation, ATK is increased by 35% for 10 sec.
Removes ATK Spd debuff effect and adds a 3 sec Stun.
dark.to: Damage dealt is reduced by 30%, but the number of hits is doubled.

light.from: Increases ATK by 0.5% for 10 seconds upon a Crit Hit. This effect can be stacked up to max 100 times.
light.to: Has a 15% chance to stun the target for 1 sec.

dark.to: Damage dealt is reduced by 30%, but the number of hits is doubled.

description.from: [Roll Over] increases DMG by {0}% on every use and recovers 120 MP upon a Crit Hit. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
description.to: [Roll Over] increases DMG by {0}% on every use and recovers 120 MP upon a Crit Hit. This effect stacks up to max 10 times.

description.from: [Miruru Pirates!] DMG is increased by 50%, and skill cooldown is reduced by {0}%.
description.to: [Miruru Pirates!] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces Cooldown by {0}%.

description.from: [Boooooom!] Increases DMG by 50%. Upon activation, increases ATK Spd by {0} for 3 sec.
description.to: [Boooooom!] increases DMG by 50% and boosts ATK Spd by {0}% for 3 sec upon activation.

dark.from: Miruru stacks Darkness depending on the number of enemies she hits. When she reaches 50 stacks, she goes berserk, boosting her Atk Spd by 800 and her ATK by 20%.
dark.to: On hit, gains [Darkness] stacks equal to the number of enemies struck. When [Darkness] reaches 50 stacks, all [Darkness] is removed and you enter [Rampage] for 10 sec, increasing Attack Speed by 48% and Attack by 25%.

description.from: Deals P.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK to the enemies inflicted by the Boooooom! skill at a 50% chance, and the target takes {1}% more P.DMG for 10 seconds.
description.to: When using [KABOOM!] attacks, has a 30% chance to deal additional Physical Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power and increase the target's Physical Damage taken by {1}% for 10 sec.
